overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character exploring a cozy, rustic stone cottage interior. The character moves through a dining area, past a lit fireplace, through a living space with an armchair, and approaches a desk with an interactable letter. Warm lighting from the fire and windows creates an atmospheric medieval setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage dining area with stone fireplace

events.description: approaching the lit fireplace, warm orange glow becomes dominant light source

agents.ego_description: hooded character walking slowly through the dining area toward the fireplace, examining the room

entered.detail: long wooden dining table with benches along the left wall
large stone fireplace with active fire burning inside
tall standing lamp with fringed fabric shade
decorative wall hanging with geometric diamond pattern
upholstered armchair positioned near the window

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a stone-walled cottage dining area with a long wooden table to the left. The hooded character walks forward toward a large stone fireplace with an active fire, passing a floor lamp and wall tapestry. Warm firelight gradually illuminates the scene as an armchair and window become visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: living area transitioning to bedroom nook

events.description: moving from main living area with fireplace into the bedroom nook with bed and wardrobe

agents.ego_description: character continues walking past the armchair toward the bedroom area with bed and storage furniture

entered.detail: wooden bed with canopy and white bedding in the corner nook
tall wooden wardrobe with carved details
mirror mounted on wall above a washstand
potted plants hanging from ceiling beams near the window

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the fireplace into a brighter living area with an armchair and hanging plants, then transitions into a bedroom nook. A bed with white linens and a wooden wardrobe become prominent on the right, while natural light streams through windows. The fireplace recedes into the left background as the character explores deeper into the cottage.

scene_state.functional_zone: study area with desk and storage chest

events.description: interaction prompt appears for a letter on the desk, indicating an interactable object

agents.ego_description: character approaches the wooden desk, pausing briefly where an interaction prompt appears for a letter, then continues moving

entered.detail: wooden writing desk with scattered papers and bottles
large storage chest with metal bands sitting on the floor
circular woven rug covering the wooden floor near the desk
closed wooden door with iron hinges at the back of the room

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward a study area featuring a wooden desk with scattered papers and a large storage chest. An interaction prompt appears indicating a readable letter on the desk. The character circles the desk area, passing over a round woven rug, with a closed wooden door visible in the background. The bed and fireplace are now behind the character as they explore this final corner of the cottage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic stone cottage, transitioning from a warm, firelit dining area into a bright, sun-drenched study. It begins in a dining space with a long wooden table, moving forward as the glow of a large stone fireplace gradually illuminates a wall tapestry and a distant armchair. As the character passes the hearth, the scene opens into a brighter living area filled with hanging plants before shifting into a bedroom nook where natural light streams over white linens and a wooden wardrobe. The camera then glides deeper into the cottage toward a study area, passing over a round woven rug to reveal a wooden desk scattered with papers and a storage chest. Finally, the movement settles around the desk as an interaction prompt for a letter appears, leaving the fireplace and bed behind in the background.
